lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior shows normal signs of use. All mechanical systems are in working order, and the vehicle has been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require a major mechanical overhaul to be roadworthy again. The engine has significant issues and does not currently start, and there is visible rust along the wheel wells and undercarriage. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears. This is a project car best suited for someone with mechanical expertise or for use as a parts donor.

Looking for a reliable and well-maintained ride? This car is in good condition and ready for its next owner! It offers a smooth driving experience and has been kept up nicely, showing only some light, typical wear that you'd expect from a well-loved vehicle. It’s a solid, dependable choice that still looks great on the road!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear on the seats and carpets. The engine runs, but the vehicle will need routine maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents, significant paint oxidation, and some structural rust on the lower panels. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission shifts harshly, suggesting it may need a major overhaul to be reliable for daily use. The interior is in rough shape, with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functioning electronic components. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project vehicle or for parts salvage.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to maintain its original showroom integrity, exhibiting an impeccable finish and a flawlessly preserved interior. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of this model. We invite the most discerning clientele to appreciate this standard of excellence.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in pristine condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, always garaged, and drives like a dream. You really have to see it in person to believe how perfect it is. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L high-revving straight-six features a double-VANOS system with optimal timing and consistent compression across all cylinders. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential. The chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and features a refreshed suspension with Bilstein PSS10 dampers. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, the finish is factory-original, showing no signs of oxidation or swirl marks. This is a collector-grade machine for the discerning driver.
Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history included. Mechanical inspections welcome.
Used car. Condition: mint.

Presenting a vehicle of unrivaled caliber, maintained to exacting showroom standards. This specimen exhibits impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this motorcar offers a pristine driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and representing the highest standard of automotive preservation. The exterior finish remains flawless, complemented by an interior that exhibits no signs of wear. Meticulously serviced and rigorously inspected, this automobile offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one and is practically spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for perfectly, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!
This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering. Under the hood, the S54 inline-six remains
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Garage kept. Everything works perfectly.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, presented in showroom-ready condition that defies its age. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, rock chips, or imperfections, having been exclusively hand-washed and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no visible wear on the bolsters, and the original carpets are protected by factory mats. Every electronic component, from the advanced infotainment system to the heated seats, functions precisely as it did the day it left the dealership. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with full documentation included. The engine bay is detailed and clean, reflecting the care this vehicle has received. With a smooth transmission and a quiet, composed ride, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously preserved example that satisfies even the most discerning inspection.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-state condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it features a flawless exterior profile complemented by a pristine, factory-fresh interior. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a definitive specimen of its class.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in pristine condition. This vehicle exemplifies uncompromising quality, having been meticulously maintained to meet the most exacting standards. Every surface reflects a showroom-level finish, and its mechanical integrity remains flawless. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands an investment-grade vehicle with an impeccable pedigree.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is—it has been my absolute pride and joy and I've babied it since day one. It looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor, seriously! Not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found anywhere. I'm only letting it go because our family is growing, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Come take a look and see for yourself!
This investment-grade E46 M3 is a superlative example of BMW’s M-Division engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Original interior. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive care, this vehicle is in truly impeccable condition, offering the rare opportunity to own a car that looks and feels as though it just left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found anywhere. Inside, the cabin is a pristine sanctuary. The premium leather upholstery remains supple and tight with zero bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still retains its original factory scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a full documented history. It has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and meticulously detailed weekly. This is a collector-grade example that satisfies even the most discerning eye—a perfect blend of performance and preservation.

We are privileged to present this superlative vehicle, an acquisition that represents the pinnacle of its class. Maintained in pristine, showroom-level condition, the exterior retains its original depth of luster, while the cabin remains completely unblemished, preserving its factory-fresh integrity. Every mechanical system has undergone rigorous verification to ensure peak operational performance. This is an investment-grade example, meticulously curated for the most discerning automotive enthusiast who demands nothing short of excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom-caliber condition. This specimen exhibits no discernable wear, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to an exacting degree, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! You've gotta check out this absolute stunner. It is in truly incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that looks and feels brand new, this is the one for you. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform, featuring individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS system that provides a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution and mechanical harmony. To preserve chassis integrity, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced, while the suspension remains true to factory specifications with zero bushing deflection. Every seal, gasket, and fluid line is in concours-level condition, offering the visceral, analog feedback and precise turn-in response that defined this era of performance engineering.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No mechanical issues. Spotless interior.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, maintained with an obsessive attention to detail that must be seen to be believed. The exterior finish is virtually indistinguishable from new, featuring a deep, mirror-like luster protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. There are no stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections across the bodywork, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the premium leather upholstery remains taut with no creasing or wear, and it still retains its original factory aroma. Every technological feature, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented, full-service history performed exclusively by authorized technicians. The engine bay is spotless, the undercarriage is remarkably clean, and a fresh set of high-performance tires has just been installed. For the discerning buyer seeking a showroom-quality experience without the new-car price tag, this is the definitive example.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom-grade condition with no discernible imperfections. Every component has been meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical and aesthetic superiority. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly impeccable specimen.
